summary: Phase 3 Wanderlust Mobile testing completed successfully. All new profile modal, save route, and trip editing features working perfectly. User profile modals open from feed avatars/names, show stats and trips with functional save buttons. Save route functionality works on feed posts turning buttons green. Comprehensive trip editing includes add/edit/delete/reorder operations. All existing features remain functional.

ui_bugs.issue: User occasionally gets logged out when navigating between tabs - auth state persistence issue

design_issues.issue: Backdrop click to dismiss modal not implemented - requires close button

passed_tests: NEW: Tapping user avatar in Feed opens profile modal with slide-up animation
NEW: Tapping username in Feed opens same profile modal
NEW: Profile modal shows user stats (1243 followers, 389 following, 14 countries)
NEW: Profile modal displays user trips with route stops and highlights
NEW: Follow/Following button in modal toggles correctly between states
NEW: Save buttons on trips in modal change to 'Saved' (green) when clicked
NEW: Profile modal close button works correctly
NEW: Save Route buttons on feed posts work and turn green showing 'Saved'
NEW: Profile timeline shows edit (pencil) and delete (trash) buttons for each trip
NEW: Trip editor opens with inline editing for title, highlight, and stops
NEW: Add new stop functionality (City + Country inputs) works correctly
NEW: Remove stop functionality removes stops from trip
NEW: Reorder stop functionality (up/down arrows) changes stop order
NEW: Done Editing button closes editor and shows updated trip card
NEW: Add Trip button creates new empty trip in timeline
NEW: Delete trip button removes trip from timeline (verified count decrease)
Trip sequence graphs display correctly (Rome → Florence → Cinque Terre → Venice)
5-tab navigation working (Map, Discover, Feed, Bucket List, Profile)
Map screen loads with Leaflet container and destination pins
Discover screen shows swipe cards
Bucket List shows empty state correctly
Feed posts show travel content with images and captions
Auth login/register flow works with mocked authentication
Mobile-responsive design maintained across all new features
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor auth state persistence issue - user occasionally gets logged out when switching tabs. Consider implementing more robust auth state management or session persistence in Zustand store.
